description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, rectangular layout and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The exterior features a combination of white and light gray walls, with a brick base running along the lower perimeter. Large windows are distributed across the structure, including a sunroom or enclosed patio area with a glass roof on one side. The main entrance is accessed by a wide staircase leading up to the porch, and there is a driveway or ramp adjacent to the building. The roof is mostly flat, with some sections featuring skylights or glass panels, allowing natural light into the interior spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a brick base, and a prominent front porch with steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide staircase, main entrance, and full-length porch with supporting columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway/ramp, sunroom with glass roof, and multiple large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, skylights, and a long brick base with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sunroom extension, additional windows, and the driveway/ramp leading to the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and large sunroom glazing
